script: const getAudioPath=async(e,t,i,a)=>{let o=require("path"),n=require("fs"),s=new Date().getTime()+".mp3";return n.existsSync(o.join(i,"tts"))?(n.writeFileSync(o.join(i,"tts",s),await getTTSAudio(e,t,a)),console.log("folder already exists")):(n.mkdirSync(o.join(i,"tts")),n.writeFileSync(o.join(i,"tts",s),await getTTSAudio(e,t,a)),console.log("folder created successfully")),o.join(i,"tts",s)},getTTSAudio=async(e,t,i)=>{let a=i.apiKey||"",o=i.voiceId||"JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb",n=i.modelId||"eleven_multilingual_v2",s={speed:t||1},l=`https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech/${o}?output_format=mp3_44100_128`,g=require("axios");return new Promise((t,i)=>{g.post(l,{text:e,model_id:n,voice_settings:s},{headers:{"xi-api-key":a,"Content-Type":"application/json"},responseType:"arraybuffer"}).then(e=>{console.log(e),t(e.data)}).catch(e=>{console.log(e),i("")})})},getTTSVoice=async e=>{let t=e.apiKey||"",i="https://api.elevenlabs.io/v2/voices?page_size=100",a=require("axios");return new Promise((o,n)=>{a.get(i,{headers:{"xi-api-key":t}}).then(t=>{console.log(t);o(t.data.voices.map(t=>{let i=t.labels||{},a=i.gender||"unknown",o=i.language||t.verified_languages&&t.verified_languages[0]&&t.verified_languages[0].locale||"";return{name:t.voice_id,gender:a.toLowerCase(),locale:o,displayName:`ElevenLabs - ${t.name}${o?` (${o})`:""}`,plugin:"elevenlabs-tts-voice-plugin",config:{...e,voiceId:t.voice_id}}}))}).catch(e=>{console.log(e),n("")})})};global.getAudioPath=getAudioPath,global.getTTSVoice=getTTSVoice;
